entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable fitness tracker used as external data source for workout observations

entities.name: Workout Tracking System
entities.context: SQLite-based system that stores canonical workouts with metrics like duration, distance, calories, heart rate

entities.name: Canonical Workout Model
entities.context: Pattern where a single canonical workout record can be linked to multiple observation sources (Fitbit, manual entry)

relationships.context: Fitbit external IDs are matched to canonical workout records; Fitbit data can seed or be linked to workouts
The system implements a canonical-plus-observations pattern where workouts are the single source of truth and observations link external sources
